title: Home
content:
Welcome to the D2R Reimagined Wiki!

Website • Nexus Mods Page • Discord • Github

Our Mission is to provide a Diablo II experience that is both familiar and new. We aim to keep the core gameplay of Diablo II intact while adding new features and content to the game to provide a fresh experience.

Everything we do is open source whether it be files edits, or mod tools. We believe that the community should have the ability to see and modify the code that runs the mod. We also believe that the community should have the ability to contribute to the mod and help shape its future.

Want to be apart of this mission? Join our Discord Server https://discord.gg/9zZkYrSA8C for more information on contributing and collaborating.

Contribute to the Wiki

The Reimagined Wiki is a collaborative resource that is open for anyone to edit. You don't need special permission beyond registering an account to edit most pages, and your contributions can grow the wiki and help other players.

Adding content
Use visual editor when creating a page. This will let you edit a page similar to a word document.

Register to edit and track your contributions.

 

 

Credits

Credits:

A huge thanks to the following mods for making this possible as well as all the individual contributors who have joined the community and helped shape the mod.

Talonrage & nex3null - Talonrage Mod for D2R many unique items, sets, properties
zanderb25 - Vanilla Plus 
aryastark88 - Better SP
locbones (Bonesy) - Expanded Storage (With Merc Equip), Color Dye System, Charm Weight System (given by 3rd party), question assistance and modding information.
SonicEddge - 2x Enemy Multiplier
Kyech - Druid Rebalance (Partially reworked)
Cbraqz - D2R Simple Loot Filter
sandmaen - Better Potion Visibility (Not in use any longer)
seunggil - Light Pillars
anwjrlffj - Enhanced effects and sounds, Diablood, Faster Buying
Finkster4793 - Breakpoints HUD
ispeaknousa - Assassin Charges HUD
hida8633734 - seismictrail.json missile used in Tectonic Slam
celestialray - Chasm Break missile function
Brother Laz - Skill inspiration
Dize - Skill Sprites for 2.1.2 and prior

This mod is mainly edited and maintained by the community and not a single individual and therefore the changes that are made are not always properly credited or the inspiration for the changes shared or given. In our enthusiasm for being new to modding, having fun, learning new things, and just trying out various modding tools and tips provided by members of the community we may have missed something someone feels like they should receive credit for, so please reach out on Discord, through GitHub, on Nexus, or on Reddit and we will do our best to credit original authors where applicable.
